# Local Development

<div className="docs-hero">
  <div className="docs-hero__row">
    <div>
      <div className="docs-hero__eyebrow">environment</div>
      <h1>Run the full stack locally</h1>
      <p>
        Iris runs as two processes locally: a Vite frontend on port 3000 and a
        FastAPI backend on port 8000. Both read from a shared .env at the repo root.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## Environment Variables

The frontend and backend services rely on a shared `.env` file at the repository root for configuration. For local development, ensure the following variables are set:

- `VITE_SUPABASE_URL`: The URL for your Supabase project.
- `VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`: The anonymous key for your Supabase project.
- `VITE_SUPABASE_REDIRECT`: The redirect URL for Supabase authentication.
- `VITE_BACKEND_URL`: The URL where the Iris backend is accessible (e.g., `http://localhost:8000`).

These `VITE_*` variables are baked into the frontend bundle during its build process.
